data.raw_preview:
<think>
Okay, let's tackle this translation request. The user wants automotive terms translated into Russian. The format needs to be N|||translation, one line per item.

First, looking at item 1: "Tighten the two windshield mounting bolts which Connect the cords and couplers of the position lamp". The key terms here are "windshield mounting bolts", "cords and couplers", and "position lamp". I need to make sure the technical terms are correctly translated. "Tighten" would be "Затяните" in Russian. "Windshield mounting bolts" might be "болты крепления лобового стекла". "Cords and couplers" could be "шнуры и разъемы", and "position lamp" is "позиционный фонарь". So the translation would be "Затяните два болта крепления лобового стекла, которые соединяют шнуры и разъемы позиционного фонаря".
